---
title: "Hands-On Exercises"
---

<div class="section-header">
  <p>This section contains the take-home exercises completed for the module.</p>
</div>

<div class="exercise-list">

<a href="hands-on/exercise1.html" class="exercise-link">
<div class="exercise-card">

### Exercise 2

<div class="exercise-meta">Done on 22/04/2026</div>

This exercise explores more extensions of ggplot2, focusing on the visual aspects that makes visualisations more appealing.

</div>
</a>

<a href="hands-on/exercise1.html" class="exercise-link">
<div class="exercise-card">

### Exercise 1

<div class="exercise-meta">Done on 15/04/2026</div>

This exercise focuses on introduction of ggplot2 and exploring its various functions.

</div>
</a>

</div>
